name: restaurant owners processing 5–15 liquor license applications/month tool
description: For restaurant owners processing 5–15 liquor license applications/month, the complexity of paperwork causes delays in opening. We automate the application generation instead of manual application processes and paperwork.
target_audience: restaurant owners processing 5–15 liquor license applications/month
problem_solved: Complexity and time consumption in generating liquor license applications.
